positive: Minimalist, highly detailed black ink illustration of a mountain range silhouette at sunrise. The scene features stylized, jagged peaks with deep shadows and stark white negative space outlining the ridges. Incorporate subtle, repeating geometric floral patterns (like mandalas or stylized leaves) that fill the valleys and foreground rocks, creating a sense of ancient, mystical permanence. Style: Japanese woodblock woodcut (Ukiyo-e style) combined with Art Nouveau elegance. Composition: Centered, symmetrical, suitable for a circular or square print. Lighting: High contrast, dramatic silhouette against a gradient sky that transitions from deep indigo to pale gold. Color Palette: Limited to black ink on a crisp white background. Print-friendly details: Vector quality lines, crisp edges, perfect symmetry, scalable design.
negative: photorealistic, gradient background, blurry, low resolution, artifacts, text, watermarks, logo, trademark, signature, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, jpeg artifacts, messy, clutter, 3d render
